title: micranthemum erosum
intro: Micranthemum erosum, also known as creeping pennywort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of creeping pennywort include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Micranthemum erosum often involve infusions or teas made from the leaves, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
